---
title: "Risk Factors and Probability of Stroke"
author: "Joe Nagel"
date: ""
output: 
  pdf_document:
    number_sections: true
fontsize: 12pt
mainfont: Helvetica
geometry: margin=1in
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{float}
  - \usepackage{setspace}
  - \doublespacing
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(list(echo = FALSE, include = FALSE))
```

```{r}
# read in packages
library(tidyverse)
library(naniar)
library(janitor)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
```

```{r}
(
    read_csv(
        '../Data/frmgham2.csv',
        show_col_types = FALSE,
        name_repair = "unique_quiet"
    )
    %>% clean_names()
) -> fram
```

```{r}
naniar::vis_miss(fram)
```

```{r}
head(fram)
```

```{r}
(
    fram
    %>% summarise(
        .by = randid
    )
)
```


# Reproducible Research

## GitHub Link

`https://github.com/nageljo/BIOS6624`

## Dataset Filepath

`C:\Users\josep\OneDrive\AdvancedData\BIOS6624\Project3\Data\frmgham2.csv`
